Confronting formidable challenges and obstacles, will these fledgling girls triumph in their trials and forge a new world from the ashes of the old?

(Source: Youku)

The young man Qin Yang was very talented and possessed the enviable cultivation artifact "Star Gate". However, this luck was taken away overnight. When he was about to die, Qin Yang opened the dust-covered treasure "God Bead" in his body. Since then, he has restored the memory of his previous nine lives and gained a new life. At the same time, the family fell into an unprecedented crisis. Faced with many tests, Qin Yang took charge of his own affairs and relied on the experience accumulated in his nine previous lives to break through the difficulties again and again. Unexpectedly, the conspirators are still pressing forward step by step. In order to protect the people he cherishes, Qin Yang chooses to fight to the end.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

The protagonist, Lin Chu, was born into a wealthy and prestigious family. However, his parents suddenly disappeared without a trace, the family company was seized by his father's former assistant, and even the villa he had lived in since childhood was taken over by so-called creditors. Forced to temporarily reside in the Lin family's old mansion in the suburbs, Lin Chu was surprised to find mysterious voices emanating from a bonsai tree in the courtyard. He unexpectedly entered the bonsai and discovered a sacred mountain and an immortal—Xuanqing Patriarch—sealed within. Xuanqing Patriarch realized Lin Chu possessed the ability to break the seal and decided to take him as a disciple, teaching him cultivation methods so he can break the seal. At the same time, to repay Lin Chu, Xuanqing Patriarch also agreed to teach him some skills to help him investigate the truth behind his parents' disappearance. Lin Chu agreed to Xuanqing Patriarch's request and thus embarked on the path of cultivation!

(Source: Youku, translated)
Second season of Renjian Zui Deyi.

Tatsuya Kimura is beginning to feel left behind. With his friends Ippo Makunouchi and Mamoru Takamura holding the championship belt in their respective weight classes, Kimura's inability to become Japan's Junior Lightweight boxing champion eats away at him. Scheduled to fight with the current champion Ryo Mashiba, Kimura begins to train with Ippo's rival Ichirou Miyata, who previously suffered a crushing defeat from Mashiba's signature "Hitman" style of boxing.

But Mashiba has his own desire to hold onto the belt, hoping to soon shoot for the World title and secure financial stability for his sister Kumi. Will Kimura's overwhelming drive to prove his strength as a boxer overcome Mashiba's desperate wish to provide a better life for Kumi?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

The protagonist, Lin Feng, was originally a genius robotics engineer. To enhance the capabilities of his super-powered robot, he painstakingly unearthed a mysterious ancient treasure from the abyss—the Eye of the Ancestral Dragon. Just as he was about to transfer the Eye's energy into his robot, the divine power within was accidentally activated, triggering a spacetime vortex that transported Lin Feng to an ancient god-like continent that revered martial arts, where he was reborn. 

The reborn Lin Feng had his memories of his past life sealed, becoming an ordinary person who only awakened a healing-type martial soul. He faced cold shoulders and even had his fiancee break off their engagement. His fiancee's clan, determined to eliminate any future threats, ruthlessly attacked and killed him. In this moment of crisis, Lin Feng awakened his memories of the Eye of the Ancestral Dragon and was overjoyed to discover that its divine power had successfully fused with his super-powered robot. Subsequently, with the robot's assistance, he gradually mastered the Eye of the Ancestral Dragon's power and embarked on the path to becoming a powerful figure.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

I met my childhood friend again, and she had become a beautiful and innocent girl.

"It's been a while, Hayato."
"Haruki, is it?"

In the past, I used to play in the mud with my childhood friend in the countryside, and when I saw him again, there was no trace of the bratty young man I thought he was back then. Only in front of Hayato, she threw away the coat she was wearing and reacted in the same crass way she did back then. The distance between you and me has not changed.

(Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

"Capsules Project" is a collection of domestically produced animated short films created by a professional team with mature animation production experience. With the creative theme of "extreme emotions + independent themes," it does not restrict the creative form, exploring the possibilities of animation together with the team. The aim is to collaboratively create animated short films with diverse styles and characteristics, and to help Chinese animators reach the world stage. Just as there are a thousand Hamlets in a thousand people's hearts, this season's theme is "Hero." Based on their chosen emotional combinations, the team will write their own story of a "hero."

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
Seventh season of Menghuan Shuyuan.

With reports of adultery, power harassment, and compliance violations reported almost daily, the city's morals have reached rock bottom. To fight against this "unpunished evil," good citizens take up their smartphones, and magical girl Aiko takes up her Eye Stick. Aiming to realize a just and pure society, Aiko continues to fight against controversial celebrities and adulterous politicians. Aiko, be angry! Until the flames of justice burn away all evil.

(Source: X Anime, translated)

title_romaji: Monster Strike Elle: Daten no Kakusei

description:
It tells a story set in the world of the ancient Chinese classic "Classic of Mountains and Seas," showcasing the timeless bond between the two male protagonists, Xiaoyu and his apprentice Tianyi. 

(Source: Tencent, translated)

title_romaji: Xi Xing Ji: Da Yuan Hun
description:
An independent story of Sun Wukong. It tells the adventure of the great demon Wukong, who dominated the demon road in his previous life, and formed a direct bond with the human girl Guozi. 

(Source: DonghuaStream)

A girl with superhuman strength ventures into the city, only to discover she's the third-generation successor of a mystical sect. She enrolls in an academy to study and rectify unhealthy practices. When assassins from an enemy nation storm the palace, the girl leads her team to easily subdue them!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

A thousand years ago, the divine general Fei Peng and the Demon Sovereign Chong Lou engaged in a fierce battle in the New Immortal Realm. The divine sword "Zhao Dan" fell to the mortal world, and Fei Peng was demoted to earth. A millennium later, the Lock Demon Tower of Shu Mountain trembled, and Fei Peng's reincarnation, Jing Tian, who obtained the demonic sword, embarked on an adventure alongside Tang Xuejian, Xu Changqing, and Zi Xuan to collect the Five Spirit Orbs and seal the Lock Demon Tower.

(Source: WeTV)

The Foodie Universe based on the Classic of Mountains and Seas will lead you into the world of the demon chef on a fantasy journey.

(Source: iqiyi, translated)

The notorious divinely-skilled Mu Tianhou was suddenly ambushed, causing a stir in the martial arts world. Two upright disciples, Zheng Dongting and Zu Beiqiu (the useless brothers), met each other because of this. In order to help their younger brother Zu Beiqiu find his wife whom he had not seen for ten years, and also to find the real murderer who killed their master, a famous constable and a rich second-generation accidentally teamed up to venture into the world and embarked on an adventurous journey of delivering a divorce letter for thousands of miles. 

The two came to the Luo family in Yangzhou, but encountered the Luo family's massacre and were mistaken for the murderer. They were called "the two evildoers of Central Plains." Between the two of them, Zheng Dongting has martial arts that he cannot use, while Zu Beiqiu has martial arts that he doesn't know how to use. Although the brothers intend to clear their names, the misunderstandings of the various factions in the martial arts world continue to deepen, and the righteous martial arts people rise up to attack them. After experiencing manny dangerous situations, the two discovered that this was a big conspiracy against them...

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

Konishi, a high school student, and his girlfriend Sanae regularly attend drama club. The boy has long fallen for the beauty for her sincerity, hard work, and other feminine advantages, and they began dating. Weeks and months passed, and the relationship did not move a step. One day, while doing another rehearsal for a drama club, Sanae finds condoms in the guy's room. Konishi thought there might be trouble. However, the girl's face was already frozen in anticipation.

title_romaji: Yuusha-chan no Bouken wa Owatte Shimatta!
description: The heroine who defeated the demon king and brought peace to the world has become arrogant. She now easily defeats the remnants of the demon king's army but can't level up anymore. However, she has disturbing dreams where she is defeated and violated by demons, feeling such real pleasure that it wears down her mind. She discovers the source of these nightmares, but it's too late to resist. Each night, these dreams corrupt her further.

title_romaji: Xian Ni Movie: Shenlin Zhi Zhan
description:
After Wang Lin's arrival in the Ancient God Land, the Eternal Night Demon City in the Demon Cultivation Sea rose overnight, continuously attacking the surrounding sects. During the battle to defend the gate, Li Muwan was poisoned, her life hanging in the balance. Upon learning of this, Wang Lin took her back to the Demon Cultivation Sea, revealing a thousand-year conspiracy...

(Source: Tencent, translated)

title_romaji: Akogare no Onna Joushi ga, Aibeya Shucchou no Tonari no Bed de Zetsurin Otoko ni Netorarete Iru
Crayon Shin-chan: Chou Karei! Shakunetsu no Kasukabe Dancers
description: The 33rd Crayon Shin-chan movie.

title_romaji: Hoshi no Kodomo to Hajimari no Ki

description: After her parents' divorce, Kotori lives alone with her father, Naoto. Over time, she develops intense feelings for him, wanting to take her mother's place. Naoto tries to control his own desires, but...

Ryusuke is a junior high school student living in Tokyo. During his summer vacation, he visits Tokushima and reunites with his teenage cousin, Tomomi. Ryusuke and Tomomi go outing to the Anabuki River where they get swept away by the rushing current.

As they sink to the bottom of the river, a dragon appears, rescues them, and takes them to a mysterious old man. The old man tells Ryusuke and Tomomi that they are already dead, but that he can send them back to life if they explore the spirit world and find their mission in life. Although perplexed with the situation, Ryusuke and Tomomi decide to begin their journey to the spirit world. First, they arrive in a gloomy town that looks like it’s from the 1960’s. Soon after, they are assailed by terrible things one after another. They see fear-ridden rogues killing one another and doctors mutilating patients. People die and rise. They get killed and rise again. Ryusuke and Tomomi realize that they are in hell. But their journey doesn’t end there. The adventure beyond this world continues into the unknown. Will they be able to find their mission in life?

(Source: dragonheart-movie.com)

Many years ago, Woonan, a legendary pirate, plundered one-third of the world's gold and stashed it away on his secret island shrouded in mystery. 

In the present, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats continue on their journey to the Grand Line. They are robbed by a group of bandits. Led by their captain, El Drago, these same bandits are headed towards Woonan's famed island. Even though the Straw Hat Pirates must now recover their stolen treasure, they have gained another objective: to discover the lost island, its treasures, and learn about the legend of Woonan.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

title_romaji: Chikuwa Senki: Ore no Kawaii de Chikyuu Shinryaku

description:
Cute yet mighty! Mini animal rangers transform into super power Force-Bot to save endangered friends!

In the ruthless world of animals, big strong animals dominate and feed on the small and weak. To buck this natural system, small animals form a secret organization "MINIFORCE." Rigidly selected mutants with special powers: Volt, Sammy, Lucy and Max become top secret rangers to save their small village Bluebell from the hand of human villain Nein and his underling lizard Pascal.

Animals in danger? No problem! When Force-Gem alerts, it's time to get suit on! With Mini Force and their transforming mechanics, it’s time to sweep! 

(Source: Samg Animation)

title_romaji: Sumikko Gurashi: Koko ga Ochitsukun Desu
The Star Seekers Hoshi wo Ou Shounen-tachi

description:
Dongfang Qingcang falls into the trap of the Peacock Military Advisor upon his return to Cangyan Sea after the war. As they say, misfortune never comes singly: Meanwhile, the God of War Chidi frequently appears in Orchid's sleep cryptically. Midway through the journey of the enemies Dongfang and Orchid, the Three Realms of Shadows, which are detached from the Three Realms, come into everyone’s view, and a huge secret subsequently surfaces.

(Source: iQIYI)

title_romaji: Gakkou de wa Oshiete Kurenai Taisetsu na Koto
description:
Unique and reliable "experts" appear before elementary school students who are struggling with issues such as "I'm not good at tidying up," "I keep putting off my homework because I'm so obsessed with games," and "My grades aren't improving as much as I'd like," and provide passionate instruction to teach them important things that they should learn but that they won't learn at school.

(Source: MANTANWEB, translated)

Short Specials included in the Blu-ray volumes, each volume has two episodes. 

1. "Hinami Becomes a Mommy at Babumi Kindergarten"
Mufu-mufu footage of Hinami at Babumi Kindergarten.

2. "Misaki Gets the Massages Everyone Else Is Getting"
Mufu-mufu footage of Misaki and massages.

3. "Kaachan: Okan, Kanojo, Nanase"
Mufu-mufu footage of Nanase at home.

4. "Master's Pet"
Mufu-mufu footage of Fumino with a collar.
Fourth season of Shixiong A Shixiong.

title_romaji: Zhege Nianji Huan Neng Dang Daxia Ma 2nd Season
description:
Old Bai (Flying Swordsman), 35, owned Chang'an Supermarket, which was originally the only commercial establishment in the neighborhood. However, the well-known chain supermarket Wow moved in, and to protect his store, Old Bai, his wife Yanzi (Yan Shanxue), and a group of neighbors and friends pulled out all the stops to fight the conglomerate and make money...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

In early 1900s Hokkaido after the Russo-Japanese war, Saichi Sugimoto tirelessly pans for gold. Nicknamed "Sugimoto the Immortal" for his death-defying acts in battle, the ex-soldier seeks fortune in order to fulfill a promise made to his best friend before he was killed in action: to support his family, especially his widow who needs treatment overseas for her deteriorating eyesight. One day, a drunken companion tells Sugimoto the tale of a man who murdered a group of Ainu and stole a fortune in gold. Before his arrest by the police, he hid the gold somewhere in Hokkaido. The only clue to its location is the coded map he tattooed on the bodies of his cellmates in exchange for a share of the treasure, should they manage to escape and find it.

Sugimoto does not think much of the tale until he discovers the drunken man's corpse bearing the same tattoos described in the story. But before he can collect his thoughts, a grizzly bear—the cause of the man's demise—approaches Sugimoto, intent on finishing her meal. He is saved by a young Ainu girl named Asirpa, whose father happened to be one of the murdered Ainu. With Asirpa's hunting skills and Sugimoto's survival instincts, the pair agree to join forces and find the hidden treasure—one to get back what was rightfully her people's, and the other to fulfill his friend's dying wish.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

title_romaji: H na Gishi Series The Animation
description:
Ryuichi is a university student. He used to live alone and enjoyed his school life. But one day, his apartment was destroyed by a fire.... He reluctantly comes back to his house. But his house has been changed to a boarding house for girls...! It seems there is no place for him to live. But they all allow him to stay there together! His new life begins like this....

(Source: Himeya Shop)

On the Divine Forgotten Continent, hundreds of races clash, and warriors reign supreme. Jiang Yun, once the head of the Imperial City's Tianyi Martial Academy, was devastated by Ye Tianxie, turning a genius into a forlorn figure. Defying fate, he unexpectedly awakened his Sword Soul Bone. With the help of Jian Miaochan, the master of the sword path, he awakened his Eternal Sword Veins, becoming the only transcendent swordsman in the Mortal Realm. 

Originally intent on dedicating himself to his training and swiftly slaying his enemies, Jiang Yun was targeted by his wife's childhood sweetheart, Ling Shaofeng. Ling Shaofeng rallied forces against Jiang Yun. Determined to protect his wife and the Tang family, Jiang Yun fought back fiercely, ultimately dismantling Ling Shaofeng and his forces and uncovering the Spirit Realm's plot to seize the Divine Forgotten Continent and exterminate humanity. For the sake of humanity, Jiang Yun was forced to temporarily set aside his hatred and join forces with his companions to resist the Spirit Realm's attack, ultimately saving the Divine Forgotten Continent and protecting humanity.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

Xuan Qi, with mediocre talent, was originally just an unranked supernatural being on the list of powerful beings, whose life's ambition was simply to survive to the end in this world, prioritizing safety above all else. However, during an outing, he happened to witness the fierce battle between the Alluring Empress and an ancient demon, becoming an innocent bystander caught in the crossfire. In this critical moment, Xuan Qi unexpectedly activated the "Heavenly Show" system, gaining the ability to continuously gain "Admiration Points" by displaying the demeanor of a peerless master. Subsequently, Xuan Qi, by sheer chance, was forced to appear as the "reincarnation of the God Emperor," seemingly effortlessly slaying the ancient demon and defeating a series of masters from the Otherworldly Demonic Path. 

From that moment on, he became famous throughout the land, revered by the entire Great Victory Divine Continent. Even more miraculously, his every word and action was always misunderstood as having profound meaning. Countless supernatural beings regarded him as a god, while the Otherworldly Demonic Path considered him a major threat.  

(Source: Tencent, translated)

title_romaji: Sylvanian Families: Freya no Wonder Days

description: Teacher Shiino Asami is quite popular at the academy where she teaches. One evening, she finds one of her students lying on the ground and bruised. She takes him in, and they become more intimate.

title_romaji: Jian Wang 3: Shen Jianxin de 365 Tian
description:
In a day like any other, Cao Xiao Man's brother, Xiao Bei, is stabbed by a man after defending a mysterious girl. Due to the incident, and to buy medicine for his brother, Cao Xiao Man decides to earn money in a rather strange way: cross-dressing as a girl and seducing men. When he arrives to his client's house everything seems to go as planned, but the client soon discovers that Cao Xiao Man is, in fact, a boy. He decides to put Cao Xiao Man in a game where he is turned into a girl. In order for Cao Xiao Man to go back to being a boy he needs to complete the game and find the 7 Loyalties located all over the country.

(Source: YouTube)

Seotaiji and Boys' legendary alternative rock song Regret of the Times (1996) was remastered in 2024.

(Source: Official YouTube Channel)

title_romaji: Qiyun Dantian: Kaiju Qiandao Zhizun Dantian
description:
Qin Shu, son of the Divine King, was born with a mortal body and destiny. He was spurned by the celestial realm and threatened with being stripped of his status as a Divine Son and banished to the mortal realm. Until he met the protagonist and became one with her, unlocking the Myriad Realms sign-in system and opening his perpetual elixir field at Chaos Heaven's Absolute Cloud Peak. He then rose from the lowest echelons of the Shinto realm, battling Asuras, ghosts, and the Martial Emperor. Single-handedly, he slew all the gods and Buddhas, ascending to the summit of the Nine-Nine Eighty-One Heavens. Even the gods could not stand in his way, and with his mortal body, he ascended to the pinnacle of Shinto. Finally, he emerged victorious from the life-and-death duels among the Sons of God, single-handedly confronting the nine sons of the Emperors, foiling Hunyuan Tianzun's terrifying plot to seize the Shinto realm and becoming the new Great Emperor.

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)
